== Notes for [[Item:Q99632|Q99632]] ==

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per03126.htm#0

RESEARCH NOTES:
of Jewish Exile (in Babylon?)

ha-DAVID

ha-DAVID

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD7F1AE41EFBBFA9822EF79916C0066
geni:6000000002187918913

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
